Validations.spacesNotAllowedEmail: Spaces are not allowed in the email
Validations.emailOnlyOneAt: Email must contain only one @ symbol
Validations.noDuplicateTld: Email cannot contain duplicate TLDs (e.g., .com.com or gmail.com.gmail.com)
Validations.invalidEmailFormatFull: Invalid email format. Please enter a valid email address.
Validations.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
Validations.passwordGreaterThan6: Password must be greater than 6 characters
Validations.passwordSpecialChar: Must include at least one special character
Validations.passwordCapitalLetter: Must include at least one capital letter
Validations.passwordLowercaseLetter: Must include at least one lowercase letter
Validations.passwordNumber: Must include at least one number
Validations.userNameMin3: user name must be at least 3 characters
Validations.userNameMax50: user name must not exceed 50 characters
Validations.userNameNoSpaces: Spaces are not allowed in the user name
Validations.userNameValidChars: user name can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens (-), underscores (_), and periods (.)
Validations.usernameMin3: Username must be at least 3 characters
Validations.usernameNoSpaces: Spaces are not allowed in the username
Validations.usernameValidChars: Username can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens (-), underscores (_), and periods (.)
Validations.phoneMinLength: Number must be at least 8 digits
Validations.phoneMaxLength: Number must be less than 12 digits
Validations.newPasswordDifferent: New password must be different from old password
Validations.newPasswordUppercase: Must include at least one uppercase letter
Validations.meetupTitleMin3: Meetup title must be at least 3 characters
Validations.meetupTitleMax100: Meetup title must not exceed 100 characters
Validations.hostNameMin2: Host name must be at least 2 characters
Validations.hostNameMax50: Host name must not exceed 50 characters
Validations.locationMin3: Location must be at least 3 characters
